decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing Goblin Engineer and Welder to recur artifacts like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to generate mana and card advantage. Emry helps to further abuse artifacts by recurring them from the graveyard. Urza's Saga is used to tutor for key artifacts like Lotus Petal or Mishra's Bauble. The deck also includes a combo with Phyrexian Dragon Engine and Agatha's Soul Cauldron to potentially win the game in one explosive turn. Overall, the deck aims to assemble a powerful artifact-based combo while utilizing Jegantha as a companion for additional value.

The main concept of the deck is to assemble the combo pieces of Emry, Lurker of the Loch, The Fantasticar, and various artifacts like Chalice of the Void and Mox Opal to generate a powerful and fast win condition. The deck aims to control the game with cards like Force of Will and Sink into Stupor while ramping into its combo pieces with fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb. The synergy between Emry and artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Urza's Bauble allows for card advantage and a quick setup for the combo.

The deck focuses on assembling the Cephalid Breakfast combo as quickly and efficiently as possible. This is accomplished by using cards like Cephalid Illusionist and Nomads en-Kor to mill the library, with Thassa's Oracle serving as the win condition. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to protect the combo and interact with the opponent. Urza's Saga provides additional utility and consistency to the deck, making it a powerful and resilient combo deck in the Legacy format.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back into play for a game-winning combo. It includes protection spells like Force of Will to ensure the combo goes off uninterrupted, as well as card draw and deck manipulation to help find the necessary pieces. A key card in this strategy is Atraxa, Grand Unifier, which can help reduce the cost of casting spells and make the combo even more explosive.

The deck focuses on establishing control through disrupting opponents' strategies while leveraging lands to generate advantage. It utilizes cards like Wasteland and Boseiju, Who Endures to disrupt opponents, while also utilizing lands like Dark Depths and Urza's Saga to create threats and generate value. The deck aims to control the game through a combination of disruptive elements and powerful land interactions, ultimately setting up win conditions that are difficult for opponents to interact with.

The deck focuses on utilizing Stoneforge Mystic to tutor for powerful equipment like Meteor Sword and Pre-War Formalwear to enhance creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd. With a heavy control element consisting of counterspells like Force of Will and Quantum Riddler, as well as removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' strategies while maintaining card advantage through cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The inclusion of versatile lands and sideboard cards like Back to Basics and Consign to Memory further solidify the deck's strategy of controlling the game.

The key concept of this deck is to assemble The Fantasticar combo, utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Dark Ritual to generate fast mana and disrupt opponents with Thoughtseize and Force of Will. The deck focuses on controlling the board with counterspells like Daze and card selection with Brainstorm and Ponder. The Fantasticar allows for explosive plays and can quickly close out games. The inclusion of utility lands like Undercity Sewers and disruption creatures like Brazen Borrower and Orcish Bowmasters adds versatility to the deck's game plan.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize the combo potential of Doomsday and Thassa's Oracle to win the game quickly. The deck includes strong card draw and filtering options like Ponder and Brainstorm, along with disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Daze to protect the combo. The inclusion of The Fantasticar allows for additional options and flexibility in executing the combo, while cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal help to generate mana quickly. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces efficiently and win the game in a decisive manner.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures with strong abilities like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben. It also includes cards like Swords to Plowshares and Static Prison to control the opponent's board while dealing damage quickly. The mana base is primarily focused on white sources, with some red support for additional damage. The deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain control throughout the game, utilizing a mix of creatures and spells to achieve victory before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly cheat out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Griselbrand onto the battlefield using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By utilizing card draw and control elements like Brainstorm, Force of Will, and Flusterstorm, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's plans while assembling its own game-winning combo. The inclusion of cards like Omniscience and Atraxa, Grand Unifier allows the deck to generate additional value and potentially overwhelm the opponent with its powerful threats.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board by using lands to disrupt their plays and generate value. By utilizing cards like Exploration, Life from the Loam, and Crop Rotation, the deck can consistently ramp into powerful lands like Dark Depths and Urza's Saga. The inclusion of Sphere of Resistance and Pithing Needle helps to further hamper the opponent's game plan, while cards like Boseiju, Who Endures provide protection for key spells. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outpace the opponent through efficient land-based control strategies.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo pieces necessary to ramp up mana and create a powerful board state with the use of cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, all while disrupting the opponent's hand with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress. The win condition revolves around utilizing The Fantasticar to generate value and potentially win the game through a powerful combo. The deck relies heavily on card selection and manipulation to ensure that the necessary pieces come together in a timely manner to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to disrupt your opponent's game plan while maintaining a steady tempo with efficient and aggressive creatures. The deck includes powerful disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, alongside efficient removal like Fatal Push. The creatures in the deck, like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent, provide a strong clock while also disrupting the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Wasteland helps to disrupt the opponent's mana base, while cards like Daze provide additional tempo advantage. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy.

This UWx Control deck focuses on disrupting and controlling the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, removal, card draw, and powerful threats. The deck aims to maintain board control with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Force of Will while generating value with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Mystic Sanctuary. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Murktide Regent and Geist of Saint Traft provides powerful win conditions to close out the game. The deck's flexibility and ability to adapt to different matchups make it a formidable opponent in the Legacy format.

The main idea of this deck is to utilize the combo with The Fantasticar, along with cards like Doomsday and Thassa's Oracle, to quickly find a win condition and control the game. The deck uses a mix of card draw, counterspells, and mana acceleration to set up the combo efficiently and protect it from disruption. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, allowing the deck to execute its game plan effectively in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The focus of this UWx Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, as well as removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending. The deck also aims to control the game with powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, while using card draw spells like Ponder and Brainstorm to find key pieces. The deck also includes versatile creatures like Baleful Strix and Brazen Borrower to provide additional value and disruption.
